html:
Exclusive to:

The Suspicious Boulder is a rounded Moonrock Boulder that will have a chance of falling during a meteor shower. Only one of this kind of boulder can be found, as it can be mined to get the Celestial Orb. If a Smooth Meteor Boulder has not dropped by day 60 the next meteor shower has a 100% chance of dropping it. Mining all boulders within the meteor field increases the chance of the Suspicious Boulder spawning.

The probability of the Suspicious Boulder appearing will depend on the following factors:

  • level of friendship of players with the Crabby Hermit
  • number of fully constructed Celestial Altars.

It drops the Celestial Orb, 1 Rocks, 1 Flint and 3 Moon Rock plus a 30% chance to get one extra when mined.

DSTDSRoGSWHam

“That rock came from the moon.”
–Wilson
“Just another rock to me.”
–Willow
“But is not cheese?”
–Wolfgang
“It's traveled so far...”
–Wendy
“A ROCK. FROM THE MOON”
–WX-78
“Implications of a lunar body? Interesting.”
–Wickerbottom
“It's uh, a moon rock.”
–Woodie
“"Moon" rock.”
–Maxwell
“A gift fröm Mani.”
–Wigfrid
“Neat!”
–Webber
“It has a very peaceful energy.”
–Warly
“Night Ball inside?”
–Wormwood
“Seems like just another rock to me.”
–Winona
“The sky has fallen.”
–Wortox
“Moonrock!”
–Wurt
“I wonder how it affects were-people. I should ask Mr. Woodie.”
–Walter
“I never would have predicted I'd see a piece of the moon up close.”
–Wanda
The Suspicious Boulder is a rounded Moonrock Boulder that will have a chance of falling during a meteor shower. Only one of this kind of boulder can be found, as it can be mined to get the Celestial Orb. If a Smooth Meteor Boulder has not dropped by day 60 the next meteor shower has a 100% chance of dropping it. Mining all boulders within the meteor field increases the chance of the Suspicious Boulder spawning.
The probability of the Suspicious Boulder appearing will depend on the following factors:
level of friendship of players with the Crabby Hermit
number of fully constructed Celestial Altars.
It drops the Celestial Orb, 1 Rocks, 1 Flint and 3 Moon Rock plus a 30% chance to get one extra when mined.

The '''Suspicious Boulder''' is a rounded [[Moonrock Boulder]] that will have a chance of falling during a meteor shower. Only one of this kind of boulder can be found, as it can be mined to get the [[Celestial Orb]]. If a Smooth Meteor Boulder has not dropped by day 60 the next meteor shower has a 100% chance of dropping it. Mining all boulders within the meteor field increases the chance of the Suspicious Boulder spawning.

The probability of the Suspicious Boulder appearing will depend on the following factors:
* level of friendship of players with the [[Crabby Hermit]]
* number of fully constructed [[Celestial Altar]]s.

It drops the Celestial Orb, 1 [[Rocks]], 1 [[Flint]] and 3 [[Moon Rock]] plus a 30% chance to get one extra when mined.
